headline: Tavira selects Broadridge to Support its Agency Brokerage Platform and Market Connectivity
summary: Global Fintech leader Broadridge Financial Solutions Inc. (NYSE: BR) today announced that Tavira Financial has selected Broadridge's High Touch Order Management System (OMS), connectivity, and middle office solutions as a key component of its trading and operational infrastructure ecosystem. Broadridge's fully integrated front and middle office capabilities will support Tavira's agency brokerage platform to optimize trading workflows, reduce operational complexity, and enhance global market conn

headline: Broadridge Schedules Webcast and Conference Call to Review Third Quarter Fiscal Year 2026 Results on April 30, 2026
summary: Broadridge Financial Solutions, Inc. (NYSE:BR) is scheduled to release its financial results for the third quarter of fiscal year 2026 on Thursday, April 30, 2026. Broadridge will host a webcast and conference call to discuss those results at 8:30 a.m. ET on April 30, 2026. Tim Gokey, Chief Executive Officer, and Ashima Ghei, Chief Financial Officer, will participate on the call.

headline: Matsui Securities Adopts Broadridge's JASDECPS on SaaS Platform, Transforming Securities Lending Business for Accelerated Growth
summary: Matsui Securities Co., Ltd. is transforming its securities lending operations by implementing the JASDEC Processing Solution (JASDECPS) from global Fintech leader Broadridge Financial Solutions, Inc. (NYSE: BR). Leveraging Broadridge's SaaS platform supports Matsui's efforts to increase revenue and enables them to better operate, innovate and grow.
